what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that declares attachment att-1aef4e5f as a board_items reference targeting board://item-6b4fb097 in the dragnet-development channel, with an added timestamp.
observations: YAML frontmatter only; no body content
Fields: id, channel, attachment_type, target, added
target uses a board:// URI scheme pointing to item-6b4fb097
conventions: id follows the att-* prefix pattern
target uses a board:// URI scheme
concerns: File contains only metadata; the referenced board item cannot be resolved from this file alone
No author or provenance field is recorded
No description of why this attachment was created
notes: A thin metadata stub that links a channel attachment to a specific board item in dragnet-development.
questions: What content or artifact does board://item-6b4fb097 represent?
What does attachment_type 'board_items' imply about the relationship?
Who added this attachment and for what purpose?
purpose_vs_actual: The file acts as a traceability link between an attachment and a board item, which matches its apparent purpose, though no explicit purpose is stated.
apparent_themes: Traceability between channel artifacts and board items
intention_signals: It appears intended to persist a reference from a channel attachment to a board item so the attachment can be located in the context of a specific board entry.
contribution: A persistent, timestamped association between attachment att-1aef4e5f and board item item-6b4fb097 within the dragnet-development channel.
summary_for_embedding: This is a YAML-frontmatter channel attachment metadata file that records attachment att-1aef4e5f as a board_items reference to board item item-6b4fb097 in the dragnet-development channel with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: It was created to persist a traceable association between a channel attachment and a board item for the dragnet-development channel.
